column2: Jul 2 2026 NEW GRADE (CSV backtest N=2391, n=182 Vuln52+ picks): Vuln52+ is NOT a uniform trap вҖ” it is ODDS-GATED. All Vuln52+ = 21.4% HR (1.23x, above baseline). Both can fire simultaneously (+8+8 stacked). IMPLEMENTATION: PwrвүҘ78 + OddsвүӨ+400 вҶ’ +8 conv boost (replaces -10 penalty). PwrвүҘ78 + Odds +401-500 вҶ’ neutral (no penalty, no boost). Gate-by-gate: PRIME alone=20.6% (1.39x, n=548); +L2=26.3% (1.77x, n=57); +Vuln>=47=28.6% (1.93x, n=21); +PM>=1.055+no-flags=40.0% (2.70x, n=10). Mechanism: THREE simultaneous confirmations required вҖ” pitcher actively collapsing RIGHT NOW (L2 blowup, not season-level Vuln), batter has confirmed HR contact on this exact pitcher's primary pitch (PRIME), and market not fading (PM>=1.055). July 9 2026 validation: Witt (PRIME+L2 Manaea, HRвң…) and Soto (ELITE+L2 Wacha, HRвң…) were the only two picks passing all gates that slate. Conv boost: +10 pts.

Jul 9 2026 (CSV 74-slate backtest, n=3012, base 14.8%): PRIME/CONFIRMED MATCH grade + Vuln 42-52 + (Env>=1.05 OR Park>=1.10) + Pwr>=80. CSV result: 26.1% HR (1.76x, n=69, 74-sl). Pwr>86 sub-bucket: 47.1% HR (3.17x, n=17) вҖ” tracking toward standalone sub-grade. Discovery: July 8 post-mortem вҖ” PCA (only pick passing all gates) hit 2 HRs. Gate logic: (1) PRIME/CONFIRMED confirms batter-side BBE edge on primary pitch; (2) Vuln 42-52 = mid-vulnerability arm where env amplification is strongest; (3) Env/Park gate selects high-noise conditions where Pwr>=80 is required to convert. Key finding: Pwr gate is load-bearing (not Env alone). Env gate without pitch grade = 1.07x only. Conv boost: +8 (Pwr>86 sub-bucket: +12). Does NOT fire when PWR_VULN_ENV_HR covers the pick (PWR_VULN_ENV requires Vuln>=50). ENV DEMOTION (separate rule): picks with Env<1.00 + no PRIME/CONFIRMED = 10.7% HR / 0.72x (n=709). PRIME/CONFIRMED grade rescues cold envs (19.7% / 1.33x with grade vs 10.7% without).

column2: What it means

Jun 29 2026 (49-slate CSV backtest, consolidated): a RANKING BADGE вҖ” NOT a grade. Single tier. Prior two-tier system (Super Nuclear + Nuclear) was retired after backtest showed the second tier had no independent edge (22.2% HR, p=0.762). SigScore gate was also removed вҖ” SigScore is a hit-primary signal with no validated HR predictive power. Fires when ALL FOUR HR-relevant gates align: (1) Power вүҘ 84 вҖ” composite power score (0-100). NOTE (fixed Jul 1 2026): this is NOT a check of the 9-gate Must-Have batted-ball filter below вҖ” that's a separate, independent system. A batter can be вҳўпёҸ NUCLEAR without passing any Must-Have gates, and vice versa; (2) Odds вүӨ +399 вҖ” market not fading the pick; (3) PM 1.02-1.08 вҖ” matchup favorable but not yet fully priced in; (4) Score < 66 вҖ” rules out stat-inflated picks where park/env/runs drove the score. Backtest: 39.1% HR (2.06x, p=0.027, n=45, ~0.9 picks/slate). ANNOTATION flag only вҖ” does not change PLAY/LEAN/PASS designation. Prepended to rationale as leading label for immediate identification of top HR targets.

Jul 1 2026 вҖ” REPLACES the old DTP (7 gates), Must-Have (10 gates), and Nuclear (13 gates) systems, which had drifted into three overlapping, inconsistently-thresholded lists that didn't match Harrison's real PropFinder filter. This is now the single canonical 9-criterion checklist, taken directly from his PropFinder screenshot: ISO>0.2 В· Barrel%>15 В· HH%>40 В· Air%>50 В· GB%<40 В· PullBrl%>10 В· FB%>35 В· Blast%>15 В· Pull%>30. PullBrl% uses the real Statcast-derived rate when available (flagged as 0.0 when no pulled barrels recorded in L10 BBEs for batters missing from the Savant Table 5 export). Note printed as 'рҹ”ө PropFinder [N/9 must-have]: ...' with the specific gates passed/failed listed. SCORING IMPACT (revised Jul 1 2026 вҖ” this should be the single biggest conv bump on the slate): tiered conv boost вҖ” 9/9 вҶ’ +20 conv (also fires вҳўпёҸвҳўпёҸ SUPER NUCLEAR, see below), 8/9 вҶ’ +12 conv, 7/9 вҶ’ +8 conv, 6/9 вҶ’ +4 conv, 3-5/9 вҶ’ +1 conv (flat band), below 3/9 вҶ’ no conv impact (note-only). ELITE CONTACT PROFILE BONUS (Jul 1 2026): an additional +5 conv fires whenever BOTH PullBrl%>10 AND FB%>35 clear simultaneously, stackable on top of whatever count-based tier the batter already earns вҖ” including 9/9 (total +25 in that case). These two gates are the highest-priority criteria: PullBrl% directly measures the HR-specific contact type, and FB% gates the launch angle profile needed to elevate the ball. Their co-occurrence is flagged visibly in the rationale as 'рҹ”Ҙ ELITE CONTACT PROFILE: PullBrl%>X + FB%>Y вҖ” both elite HR-profile gates clear (+5 conv bonus, stackable)'. For reference, the model's other top validated boosts (PWR-VULN-ENV, SWEETвҳ… EDGE SPIKE, L2 BLOWUP+VULN52 combo) cap at +15 вҖ” 9/9 here is intentionally set above that ceiling. Requires Power data loaded (avoids false positives from default-value batters). TRACKING вҖ” not yet backtested at scale (the underlying 9-stat data wasn't logged on any slate until Jun 30 2026); revisit thresholds/weights once 10+ slates of real outcomes exist.

Jul 1 2026 вҖ” NEW GRADE, TRACKING ONLY (no backtest exists yet). Fires when a batter clears ALL 9 of the PropFinder Must-Have gates simultaneously (see above). Per Harrison's explicit request, this is a HARD OVERRIDE: automatic вң… PLAY + gold tier (conv floor 45), same mechanism as the EXTREME PWR structural override вҖ” bypasses most fade-flag penalties. STRUCTURAL CAPS STILL APPLY: short start (pitcher pulled before BBE can materialize вҶ’ capped at LEAN 34), Vuln52+ combined with PMвүҘ1.10 (matchup fully priced in by market вҶ’ capped at LEAN 34). These structural blockers override even a perfect 9/9 batted-ball profile because the issue is not the batter's ability вҖ” it's whether the matchup situation allows that ability to express itself today. NOTE: PRIME picks with 2+ headwinds (e.g. Schwarber Jun 30: PRIME + ShortStart + PMвүҘ1.10) are capped at conv вүӨ34 by the PRIME 2HW block which runs before SUPER NUCLEAR and returns early вҖ” so that cap is never bypassed. K-Danger exception: reduces gold floor to 34. This is INDEPENDENT of the вҳўпёҸ NUCLEAR ranking badge above вҖ” a pick can be one, both, or neither. Validate over 10+ slates before trusting this override at face value; if the real HR rate doesn't hold up, demote to a supplemental conv bonus (like CONFIRMED MATCH) rather than a full PLAY override.

ELITE TIER (Jun 2026): Two-sided pitch correlation confirmed вҖ” pitcher is weak on their primary pitch (wOBAвүҘ0.360 allowed on that pitch type) AND the batter crushes that same pitch (wOBAвүҘ0.380 vs that type). Additional gates: PMвүҘ1.04 + PowerвүҘ53 + VulnвүӨ50 + ScoreвүҘ38 + model not вүҘ15% over-bullish vs market. Backtest (33-slate): 30% HR (1.93x, n=10). вҡЎ ALWAYS вң… PLAY + gold tier (ConvвүҘ45) вҖ” overrides all fade flags including Vuln42-44, Vuln52+, power floors, and short-start. Backtest confirms flags do NOT suppress this grade. Fires as a SUPPLEMENTAL grade stacking on top of any primary grade. CSV audit (57 slates): 24.1% HR (7/29, 1.51x). Original 30% overstated (n=10). вң… ALWAYS PLAY вҖ” overrides fade flags.

REVISED Jun 25 2026 (pkl backtest, n=3102): PM 1.08вҖ“1.15 + Score 40-70. Cap RAISED from 1.10 вҶ’ 1.15. Prior cap was wrong вҖ” pkl shows PM 1.09-1.10 is the PEAK HR bin at 31.8% (4.20x); PM 1.10-1.12 = 18.9% (2.49x); PM 1.12-1.15 = 21.6% (2.85x). TRUE kill zone = PMвүҘ1.15 (12.5% HR, 1.65x вҖ” near baseline). PMвүҘ1.15 picks are STRONG HIT signals (87.5% hit, 1.63x) but no HR edge. 41-slate CSV: 18.4% HR (21/114, 1.16x) at old gate.

Score 50-60 + PM 1.04+ + Vuln 44-53. 41-slate: CSV audit (57 slates): 19.1% HR (1.20x, n=272). Modest positive edge вҖ” standalone has real value; stacking with T4_BBE or pitch edge significantly amplifies.
NEW: SigвүҘ5 + PMвүҘ1.04 + ScoreвүҘ40. 41-slate: 18.6% HR (1.15x, n=311); hit 62.7% (~baseline). HR-primary вҖ” Sig confirms the market is underpricing the matchup edge.

UPGRADED: Cold WHR + PMвүҘ1.04 + ScoreвүҘ40. Also fires at ScoreвүҘ35 when batter has a strong pitch edge (PITCH DOM EDGE вүҘ+5 or PitchMix вүҘ0.400) вҖ” cold bat HR exception. CSV audit (57 slates): 20.5% HR (32/156, 1.29x); hit 64.2% (1.10x). suppresses HIT grades but not HR grades when pitch dominance is confirmed. 57-slate CSV audit: 20.5% HR (32/156, 1.29x); hit 64.2% (1.10x). Modest edge вҖ” rate was overstated at 41-slate 25.3%.

NEW (Jun 2026): Supplemental grade firing when ERA composite (FIP+xFIP+SIERA avg) exceeds ERA by вүҘ0.75 вҖ” pitcher has been lucky, skills are worse than ERA implies. Additional gates: PMвүҘ1.03 + PwrвүҘ55 + ScoreвүҘ38 + NO short start (short start blocks because pitcher is pulled before the ERA-based edge can materialise). Fires alongside an existing primary grade only вҖ” not standalone. Jun 4 2026: Schmitt (ERA comp 4.93 vs ERA 4.00, +420) and Chourio (ERA comp 4.97 vs ERA 4.00, +540) both HRed. Giolito exception (ERA comp 7.74 vs ERA 4.00) was correctly blocked by short start gate вҖ” 4.9 IP projected, no HRs allowed.

Jun 25 2026 (pkl backtest, n=3102): PM 1.022-1.082 + Park<0.90 + Vuln 30-55 + EdgeвүҘ1%. pkl: 33.3% HR (4.40x, n=18, p=0.0016). Discovered via exhaustive zero-FP search on Jun 24 slate вҖ” every player passing the gate on that slate hit a HR with zero false positives. Mechanism: market is underpricing the pick in three simultaneous dimensions: (1) suppressive park (Park<0.90) reduces HR expectation in market pricing; (2) non-extreme Vuln (30-55) = genuine but not trap-zone vulnerability (less market excitement); (3) model edge positive (EdgeвүҘ1%) = matchup quality being underweighted by market. When all three suppressors align, HR equity is bought at a discount three ways. HIGH-PRECISION, LOW-RECALL: fires ~1-2 picks per slate. Supplemental grade вҖ” fires alongside existing grades, never standalone. Conv boost: +12.

column1: INNING WEAK SPOT / INNING PRIME WEAK SPOT
column2: Jun 27 2026 (FanGraphs Splits POST API, split_ids=43-47, min 40 TBF): Pitcher wOBA allowed per inning (1st-5th). Batter's estimated inning based on lineup spot and projected IP вҖ” spots 1-3 face innings 1 and 4, spots 4-6 face innings 2 and 5, spots 7-9 face inning 3. PRIME (wOBA >= .410) = +3 conv; WEAK SPOT (wOBA >= .370) = +2 conv. Supplemental only. Market does not price per-inning pitcher vulnerability in individual HR odds.

Jun 27 2026 (FanGraphs Splits POST API, split_ids=1/2, min 60 TBF): Pitcher wOBA allowed at home vs away. Fires when today's venue wOBA >= .350. Some pitchers structurally struggle at certain venue types вҖ” home comfort, park dimensions, crowd noise, travel fatigue. +2/+3 conv supplemental boost.

Jun 27 2026 (FanGraphs Splits POST API, split_id=17, min 60 TBF): Pitcher wOBA allowed with runners in scoring position. Fires when RISP wOBA >= .360. Pitchers who fall apart under pressure tend to nibble, fall behind in counts, and throw more hittable pitches. Market prices overall ERA but not RISP-specific vulnerability. +2/+3 conv supplemental.

Jun 27 2026 (FanGraphs Splits POST API, split_id=18, min 30 TBF): Pitcher wOBA allowed with bases loaded. Fires when wOBA >= .450 (note: bases-loaded league avg ~0.400 due to walk scoring). Grand slam risk elevated. +3 conv supplemental.

Jun 27 2026: Cross-reference of TTO vulnerability (times through order) and batter-hand split. Fires when TTO wOBA >= .370 AND pitcher's vs-LHB or vs-RHB wOBA >= .360 (matching batter hand). Both signals independently confirm the vulnerability. +3 conv supplemental on top of existing TTO grade.

column1: вҡ пёҸ PITCHER WEAK SPOT / рҹҺҜ PITCHER PRIME WEAK SPOT
column2: Jun 27 2026 (FanGraphs Splits POST API, strType=1, min 50 TBF): Pitcher wOBA allowed by Times Through Order (1st/2nd/3rd/4th TTO). Lineup spots 1-3 вҶ’ 3rd TTO, 4-6 вҶ’ 2nd TTO, 7-9 вҶ’ 1st TTO for ~5.5 IP starter: Batter's confirmed lineup_spot falls in a batting order position where THIS pitcher allows elevated wOBA (вүҘ0.370). Inspired by PropFinder 'Pitcher Weak Spots' cheatsheet вҖ” pitchers have structural lineup-position vulnerabilities the market ignores. Thresholds vs league avg wOBA ~0.320: WEAK SPOT = allows вүҘ0.370 wOBA at batter's order position (+4 conv, вҡ пёҸ flag); PRIME WEAK SPOT = allows вүҘ0.400 wOBA (+8 conv, рҹҺҜ flag). Gates: (1) pitcher.order_woba loaded from Savant; (2) batter.lineup_spot confirmed 1-9; (3) вүҘ50 PA at that position (enforced in fetch); (4) supplemental only вҖ” fires alongside existing HR grade, never standalone. Mechanism: some pitchers are systematically exposed at specific lineup spots вҖ” e.g. struggles vs the 3-4-5 heart-of-order power hitters, or gets torched by top-of-order contact bats who work counts and see more fastballs early. TRACKING: validate over 10+ slates before treating as standalone conv driver. Sample sizes per order position are small within a single season (~50-120 PA).

REBUILT Jun 10 2026: aggregate PITCH DOMINANCE EDGE note (pitch-edge conv bonus вүҘ5) + PM 1.02-1.08 + PwrвүҘ54. No Vuln gate. 41-slate: 38.9% HR (7/18, 2.40x). The PM 1.02-1.08 ceiling is load-bearing вҖ” within the pitch-dom-edge population, PM>1.08 fades to 0.65x (well-priced). Old gate (Crushes + PMвүҘ1.04 + Vuln<53 + [PMвүҘ1.08 OR Vuln48-52]) was 0.39x and is retired.

Jun 2026, TOP-TIER conviction. Pitcher-level HR-clustering: starter leans on ONE pitch (primary usage вүҘ45%, ex-sinker/splitter) AND power bat (PwrвүҘ78) crushes it (wOBA edge вүҘ0.045). CSV audit (57 slates): 22.1% HR (15/68, 1.38x) at PwrвүҘ78 gate. Old 35.3% was at PwrвүҘ60 (retired gate). Load-bearing gates: (1) PwrвүҘ78; (2) NOT sinker/splitter (GB pitches = 12-14% HR, below base). The edge is single-pitch RELIANCE, not fastball specifically вҖ” generalizes across FF/FC/SL/ST/CH/CU. Pitch-edge family, de-duped vs PITCH DOMINANCE / CONFIRMED MATCH in conviction. Label shows pitch code + starter usage.

REMOVED: the old Score-based ELITE HR grade. Score 60+ picks hit ~7% HR (well below the 16.2% base); Score 80-100: 0% HR. Park+env+implied-runs stacking inflated Score without HR conversion. Pts-based picks are now 'рҹҹ  Strong HR'. This is NOT the same as рҹҺҜ ELITE SIGNAL HR (SigвүҘ12 + PwrвүҘ78, 1.22x) вҖ” that grade keys off composite signal score, not raw Score, and is active.
HR signal fires but HR prob <14.5% вҖ” market odds too long for reliable HR. HR-ONLY flag. Hit prop still valid вҖ” ignore this flag for hits.

Gated pick where a validated combo beats the gate. Three triggers: (1) PM 1.04-1.07 + PwrвүҘ78 вҶ’ 23.0% HR (20/87); (2) PMвүҘ1.04 + PwrвүҘ80 вҶ’ 24.3% HR (9/37); (3) Sharp Line Move + Vuln 47-52 вҶ’ 42.1% HR (8/19, 3.9x gated baseline). CRITICAL: SLM outside Vuln 47-52 = 0/12 HR вҖ” zone constraint is load-bearing. Excluded if рҹ“ү Weak vs pitcher flag is present.

Compound HR suppressor: suppressive park (<0.93x) AND short-start (<4.8 IP projected) both present. Reduces star rating by 1. Explained top-rated HR misses May 26 (Buxton, Rice, Steer). Each flag is also listed separately.

column1: вҡ пёҸ ShortStart+Vuln вҖ” Vuln grade blocked
column2: Short start projected (<4.8 IP) AND pitcher Vuln is in the 47-52 sweet zone. The Vuln-dependent grades (рҹ“Ҳ SHARP LINE + VULN, рҹ“Ҳ MKT CAUGHT UP) are BLOCKED вҖ” a pitcher who only faces the lineup for ~5 innings doesn't generate enough AB for the Vuln-based HR edge to materialise. June 4 2026: Giolito (Vuln 49, 4.9 IP) вҖ” Schwarber and Harper both 0 HR despite being in the Vuln sweet zone. Each Vuln-based grade checks this condition independently.
HR-ONLY flag. Trap pitcher вҖ” market over-values HR vulnerability. Fade for HR, neutral for hits. Ignore for hits.
HR-ONLY flag. Weak pitch match + mid-vuln + Score 50-63: HR rate 0.62x. No HR edge. Ignore for hits.
HR-ONLY flag. Score 43-54 + no supporting HR signals. HR rate below baseline. Hit prop may still be valid вҖ” ignore for hits.

Hit score <20 (driven by low WHR or L5). Cold contact zone вҖ” high miss risk for hits. Note: cold flag does NOT suppress HR grade when PITCH DOM EDGE вүҘ+5 is present вҖ” cold bats can still HR on a pitch type they own (see рҹ§Ҡ ICE COLD+SIGNAL HR).
Batter has elevated career K rate vs this pitcher. Reduces contact chances вҖ” fade for both hits and HRs.
Specific K-rate signal vs named pitcher. Same as above вҖ” reduces hit and HR probability.
Moderate K risk vs this pitcher. Less severe than K-Danger but worth noting.

Recent form (last-5) is ahead of season average and model detected declining trajectory. Single occurrence = informational note only. Double occurrence (picked up twice in notes) = explicit flag surfaced here with -2 hit pts. Does not override strong grades вҖ” reduces borderline picks.

Conv Score (0-50) < 20 on a WEAK+CLEAN pick. Historical: 25.0% hit rate (3/12) vs 43.8% base WEAK+CLEAN. High HS driven by past form but matchup quality is poor. Carroll May 26: HS 58, WHR 94%, Conv 14 вҶ’ 0 hits. Reduces hit conviction вҲ’3 pts.
Batter hit rate вүӨ35% vs this specific pitcher in career matchup data. Negative hit signal.
Batter hit rate 36-45% vs this pitcher. Soft negative вҖ” below league avg but not a hard fade.

Model is вүҘ15pp more bullish on HR than market. Historical: 7.5% HR in вүҘ15% edge zone (fade). Now demotes star rating -1 (вүҘ25% edge = -2 stars). Does NOT apply to 2+ grade stacking picks вҖ” edge can be real when multiple independent grades confirm.
R vs R + HS 47-55 + Sig=0 + no Crushes primary. Hit suppressor for Sal Stewart archetype: same-side with no supporting signal. -2 hit pts. Does not apply when SigвүҘ5, SLM, or Crushes primary fires.

Pitcher CSW% вүҘ33%. Called Strikes + Whiffs as % of total pitches. Target >30% per video. Better than SwStr% alone because it adds called strikes (K-looking). Elite command = fewer good count situations = fewer HR opportunities.
Pitcher CSW% <25%. Losing the zone вҖ” batters working counts, getting into HR-friendly hitter's counts (2-0, 3-1). Combined with Z-Contact вүҘ88% is the strongest HR-prone discipline signal.

Pitcher Z-Contact% вүҘ88%. Batters making easy in-zone contact. For HR scoring: model boosts xSLG contribution weight from 25Г— to 35Г— for these pitchers. For HIT scoring (Jun 15 2026): now fires as explicit вҡЎ Z-CONTACT BOOST grade (+2 hit pts) when PMвүҘ1.00 вҖ” directional hit lift validated on Jun 15 slate (Bleday, Caglianone, Adell, PCA all recorded multi-hit games vs Z-Contact вүҘ88% pitchers).
Pitcher O-Swing% вүҘ36%. Batters swinging at pitches outside the zone. Above the 32% average. Gets batters expanding zone = fewer walks = fewer base-runners = fewer HR opportunities.
Pitcher O-Swing% <28%. Batters staying disciplined вҖ” not chasing bad pitches. Working good counts, getting pitches to hit.

Average of FIP, xFIP, and SIERA when all three are available. When composite diverges вүҘ0.75 from ERA, the composite is more predictive. ERA understated = pitcher luckier than skills suggest. ERA overstated = pitcher tougher than ERA implies, regression candidate for HR picks. When ERA understated вүҘ0.75 + PMвүҘ1.03 + PwrвүҘ55 + no short start, fires the formal рҹ“Ҡ ERA Understated HR supplemental grade (see above).

Skill-Interactive ERA from FanGraphs. Incorporates K%, BB%, and GB% more accurately than FIP. SIERA > FIP usually means the pitcher has been getting HR luck (low HR/FB despite weak contact). Better for pitchers with extreme GB% or K%.

Individual pitch-type edge flag (June 2026). Fires when a batter has wOBA вүҘ0.100 above league average vs a specific pitch type (SL/CU/CH/ST/SI/FC/FF) AND that pitch is the pitcher's meaningful weapon (вүҘ12% usage). Format: 'рҹ’Ҙ SL edge 0.423 38%bb' = batter wOBA 0.423 vs slider, 38% barrel rate. Only fires for genuinely elite edges вҖ” mild +1/+2 conv edges are scored but not flagged. Pairs with рҹҺҜ Pitch corr flag when pitcher is also weak on the same pitch.

Score 60+ trap only вҖ” 0/17 HR (0.00x) at ScoreвүҘ60 in Vuln45-48 zone. No penalty below Score 60. Note: Vuln44-45 (1.32x positive) is explicitly excluded from any penalty. Signal pts: -3 when ScoreвүҘ60. Hit rate 1.09x вҖ” unaffected for hits.

column1: вҡ пёҸ Elite arm (Vuln NN) вҖ” hit suppressed
column2: HIT-ONLY suppressor (Jun 15 2026): Pitcher Vuln < 38 = genuinely elite arm. The same quality that prevents HRs also suppresses hits. Jun 15 evidence: Otto Lopez (0 hits vs Wheeler Vuln 36.8, HS 66.2, WHR 88%, top hit pick) and Juan Soto (0 hits vs Burns Vuln 34.9, PITCH-RELIANT HIT + SLM both fired). Strong batter signals did not overcome elite arm quality. Penalty: -3 hit pts. Exception: CONFIRMED MATCH picks override (two-sided pitch correlation is pitcher-specific enough to survive the broad arm quality flag). CARVE-OUT (Jul 2 2026): When pitcher has 'Suppressing L5' AND Z-Contact% вүҘ88%, hit suppression is REMOVED. These signals are independent вҖ” Suppressing L5 = not giving up HRs (HR-specific), Z-Contact вүҘ88% = batters make easy in-zone contact (hit-specific). McDonald (Vuln 35, Suppressing L5, Z-Contact 90.4%) had 82.4% hit rate in data (14/17). The -3 penalty should NOT fire for contact pitchers who suppress HRs through soft contact, only for true power/swing-and-miss arms.

column1: вҡ пёҸ First start of season
column2: Pitcher making their first start of the year, having only appeared in relief to this point. Detected when all 2026 game log appearances show gamesStarted=0. Scoring (June 2 audit вҖ” increased): +4.0 opp_score boost + +5.0 base conv pts; +2.5 more if batter OPSвүҘ0.900 or HR rateвүҘ5% career vs pitcher; +2.5 more if batter crushes this pitcher's primary pitch type (pitch_edge_bonusвүҘ3.0). Max conv boost: +10.0 pts. Plus +12% ranking_score multiplier. Total max lift: very significant. Relief stats (ERA, K/9, HR/9) don't translate to starting вҖ” the pitcher hasn't paced over 100+ pitches, hasn't faced a lineup 3x through, may have diminished velocity/command. Short-start 'neutral/negative for HR' note suppressed; vulnerability is on the starter.

Batter wOBA weighted by THIS pitcher's actual pitch distribution. The Barrel Boyz 'PitchMix AVG' signal (e.g. Schwarber .265 vs Vasquez mix). Computed as: sum(pitcher_usage_pct Г— batter_wOBA_vs_pitch_type). More precise than individual pitch type edges вҖ” accounts for HOW OFTEN the pitcher throws each pitch. вүҘ0.400 = elite (+4 conv), вүҘ0.370 = strong (+2). Requires вүҘ30% pitch coverage for reliable estimate.

Batter wRC+ specifically vs RHP or LHP (Barrel Boyz 'wRHP%/wLHP%' metric). Index where 100 = league average. 147 = 47% better than average vs that hand. Source: FanGraphs batting splits. вүҘ140 = elite (+2 conv), вүҘ120 = good (+1). вүӨ75 = struggles vs this hand (-1.5 conv). Different from wOBA вҖ” this is context-adjusted.

% of pitches the pitcher leaves in the heart of the zone (league avg ~8-9%). Source: Baseball Savant pitcher leaderboard. Directly measures 'HR-friendly contact' вҖ” Propfinder methodology uses this alongside barrel%, HH%, and HR/FB% to rank pitchers by HR risk. вүҘ12% = elite meatball rate, pitcher frequently over the plate. Contributes to pitcher_vuln_score and surfaces as рҹҚ– flag in picks tables.

Two-sided pitch matchup check from Propfinder methodology: pitcher is weak on their primary pitch type (high wOBA/barrel% allowed on that pitch) AND batter specifically crushes that same pitch type. The 'direct correlation between pitcher weakness and hitter strength'. Fires as a note in detailed breakdown and flag in picks table. More precise than one-sided batter wOBA edge alone вҖ” both sides must confirm.

Barrel Zone Match (BZM) вҖ” a hyperlocal pitch-location edge. Fires when (1) the pitcher locates вүҘ12% of in-zone pitches of type PT in a specific strike zone cell (season data, normalized to in-zone pitches only), AND (2) the batter's season xwOBA in that same cell is вүҘ.400 (solidly above average). N = number of matching zones; PT = pitch type (FF, SI, SL, etc.); zones are labeled up/in, up, up/out, mid-in, middle, mid-out, low-in, low, low/out. Example: 'рҹҺҜ 2 BZM-SZN (FF): up/in, middle' = pitcher locates his four-seamer to the up/in and middle zones most often, and the batter has elite xwOBA in both cells. Higher N = more overlapping hot-spot edges on this exact pitch type. Both pitcher and batter use season data for stable zone coverage (200-400+ events). Conviction boost: +2 for 1 zone match, +4 for вүҘ2 zone matches (from Jun 15 2026). Only fires inside the pitch-correlation block вҖ” both sides of the matchup must already be confirmed before BZM is evaluated. Jun 15 2026 first live slate: 4/7 HR (57%), 5/7 hit (71%) across all BZM picks.

TRACKING grade (Jun 15 2026): Multi-zone Barrel Zone Match with full-quality matchup confirmation вҖ” the most stringent BZM condition. Fires when ALL of: (1) BZM вүҘ 2 zones matched; (2) Pitch quality signal confirmed (Pitch Corr OR PitchMix wOBA вүҘ.400 OR PITCH DOM EDGE); (3) Vuln 44-52 OR a dead-zone-override grade (CONFIRMED MATCH etc.); (4) At least one documented pitcher weakness (weak bullpen HR/9, ERA understated, HR-prone L5, Z-Contact вүҘ88%); (5) PitchMix wOBA вүҘ.400. Conviction: +5 (above single-BZM credits). Jun 15 live: 1/1 HR (100%, n=1 вҖ” Burleson, 2 BZM + CONFIRMED MATCH + pitch edge + bullpen 1.67). Historical backtest not possible (BZM is a new signal). Track going forward.

TRACKING grade (Jun 15 2026, Contreras archetype): Fires when the hand-specific park factor is extreme (вүҘ1.20x) AND the bat/matchup structure is solid (PMвүҘ1.04 + PowerвүҘ79 + Vuln 44-52). Surfaces extreme park advantages that the main scoring engine under-weights. Contreras hit 2 HRs at +390 with RHB park 1.280x vs Eovaldi вҖ” model gave him Conv 17 (LEAN, no named grade) because the park factor wasn't weighted into any grade. Fires as a supplemental grade when no primary pitch-edge grade already catches the pick. Conviction: +4. Jun 15 live: 1/1 HR (100%, n=1). Validate over next 10+ slates.

Sub-signal and formal grade (рҹҺҜ PITCH EDGE HR). Fires when a batter earns a full pitch dominance edge bonus (вүҘ+4 conv from crushing the pitcher's primary pitch type) but the PITCH DOMINANCE HR primary grade is blocked вҖ” most commonly by a short-start (pitcher projected <4.8 IP) or by the PM gate. The batter has near-PITCH DOM level contact quality against this pitcher's arsenal; the grade just couldn't fire cleanly. As a sub-signal it appears in the Grade column alongside the primary grade. As a formal grade (рҹҺҜ PITCH EDGE HR) it counts toward grade_count and stacking tiers when firing alongside SHARP PM HR or MID-SCORE HR. First validated: Yordan Alvarez HR vs Bubba Chandler, June 2 2026 (PITCH DOM blocked by 4.8 IP short-start; PITCH EDGE HR fired; Alvarez homered at +250).

Pitcher has 3+ of 6 independent HR risk signals elevated simultaneously: Barrel% allowed вүҘ10%, Hard Hit% вүҘ42%, HR/FB% вүҘ15%, Meatball% вүҘ10%, GB% вүӨ38% (fly-ball pitcher), K% вүӨ16% (can't miss bats). This is the Propfinder 'Pitcher HR Risk Score' concept вҖ” multiple metrics confirming the same underlying HR vulnerability. 2 factors = вҡ пёҸ Dual HR risk.

Pitcher barrel rate against вүҘ12% (вүҲ1.6x league avg). Source: Baseball Savant pitcher leaderboard. Already used in pitcher_vuln_score(). Now surfaced as a user-visible flag. Key signal per analysts: Vasquez 13.2% = 5th percentile worst, Sugano 12.8%/PA = worst of 150 pitchers вҖ” means batters routinely square them up.
Pitcher barrel rate against 10-11.9% (1.3-1.6x avg). Significant HR risk signal, especially when combined with low GB% and low K rate.

Lethal combo: pitcher K%+BB%<22% (must allow contact) AND barrel rate вүҘ10%. The pitcher has no way to avoid hard contact вҖ” Vasquez/Sugano archetype. When both fire simultaneously: highest HR risk tier.
Pitcher hard-hit rate against вүҘ44% (vs 36.5% league avg). Companion to barrel rate вҖ” confirms batters make easy hard contact on this pitcher.

Batter SLG in last 7 days is вүҘ1.35x their season xSLG вҖ” active power breakout. Source: MLB Stats API byDateRange. Sharp analysts cite L7 SLG specifically (not just BA) because slugging captures HR power. +2-4 conv pts; +2 more if 2+ HRs in window.

Batter HR/PA vs opposing pitcher hand is вүҘ1.6x league avg (вүҲ5.4%+ HR/PA). Source: FanGraphs splits. Distinguishes platoon-specific power (e.g. Aranda 10/11 HRs vs RHP, Lowe 11/14 vs RHP). +3 conv pts.
вүҘ75% of batter's season HRs vs today's pitcher hand (min 5 total). Confirms platoon HR concentration. Shown as count e.g. '10/11 HRs vs RHP'.
Pitcher HR/9 at this venue type is вүҘ1.20x season avg. Source: FanGraphs home/away HR/9 splits. E.g. Flaherty 6/8 HRs on road вҖ” venue split not captured by overall stats. +20% rate boost.
Batter SLG at today's venue type (home/road) вүҘ0.550. Source: FanGraphs home/road splits. E.g. Lowe slugging .644 on road. +3 conv pts.

Propfinder-style distance signal (Jun 2026): the batter's recent fly-ball carry (projected distance on LA 20-40 balls, last 14 days, Statcast) vs today's PULL-side fence (LF for RHH, RF for LHH) from the park-dimensions table. Carry edge (+2.5) = typical fly clears the wall; Carry fit (+1.5) = typical fly is fence-adjacent; Carry short (-2) = even top-end distance can't reach. Distinct from spray_park_factor, which keys off pull TENDENCY вҖ” this checks whether the batter physically reaches the wall here. Neutral when distance or park dims are missing. Cutoffs are first-pass вҖ” recalibrate after live runs.

Cheatsheet 3-of-5 HR-candidate rule (Jun 2026, from the Propfinder YouTube creator): counts how many of five power thresholds a hitter clears вҖ” Barrel%вүҘ12, FB%вүҘ38, HR/FB%вүҘ15, HH%вүҘ42, Pull-air%вүҘ18 (recency-weighted barrel/HH when L14 data exists). Calibrated to realistic MLB-elite levels, NOT the video's literal 20/40/20/45/20 (season barrel% rarely reaches 20% вҖ” even the model's own Elite barrel flag is 13% вҖ” so the literal bars left the rule dormant). 3+ = strong HR candidate. Conv: 3вҶ’+1.5, 4вҶ’+3, 5вҶ’+4.5 (halved when raw power вүҘ68, which regresses). The individual metrics are already scored; this rewards the CLUSTER firing together, which the video treats as its own gate. Bars and weights are tunable.

Ballpark hand-specific HR factor differs from overall by вүҘ0.05. Already applied in scoring via STADIUMS table (park_hr_factor_l/r). Surfaces as a note when the handedness split is meaningful. E.g. Yankee Stadium: 1.22x for LHB vs 1.12x overall.

Pitcher allowed вүҘ3.0 HR/9 in last 2 starts AND diverges from L5 avg by вүҘ2.0 HR/9. L5 average masks an acute recent blowup (e.g. Alcantara: L5=1.57 but 5 HRs in last 2 starts). Model engages four-window blend: 35% L2 + 25% L5 + 40% season вҖ” highest recent weight. Strongest recency HR vulnerability signal.

Pitcher has allowed HRs at a rate вүҘ0.4 above season avg over last 5 starts (IP-weighted). E.g. 2.86 HR/9 vs 1.20 season = getting hit hard recently. Boosts HR vulnerability in scoring вҖ” pay attention when this fires on a pitcher you're targeting.

Pitcher has allowed HRs at a rate вүҘ0.35 below season avg over last 5 starts. E.g. 0.27 HR/9 vs 1.20 season = dominating recently. Model reduces HR vulnerability. Buy-low on the pitcher, fade HR plays unless other strong signals override.
Pitcher L5 HR/9 is within 0.35 of season avg вҖ” at their normal level. Informational note showing the L5 HR/9 and sample IP for context. No adjustment in either direction.

Pitcher BB/9 вүҘ4.5 over last 5 starts вҖ” losing the strike zone recently. Walking batters = falling behind in counts = throwing meatballs = higher HR risk. Slight HR vulnerability boost. Often accompanies HR-prone L5.

Jul 1 2026 (FanGraphs game-log type=4): Pitcher's L5-start avg fastball velocity is вүҘ1.5 mph below season avg. Pitch quality degraded вҖ” reduced spin, movement, and tunneling effectiveness. +2 vuln when вүҘ1.5 mph decline; +4 vuln at вүҘ2.5 mph (SEVERE). Velocity decline is a leading injury/fatigue indicator that precedes ERA deterioration by 2-3 weeks.

Jul 1 2026: Fastball velocity вүҘ2.5 mph below season avg over last 5 starts. Highest urgency signal вҖ” pitcher is losing significant stuff quality. +4 vuln added to pitcher_vuln_score. Also triggers Pitcher Vulnerability Cascade independently (even without HR-prone L5 + command issues).
Jul 1 2026: Pitcher's L5 fastball velo is вүҘ1.5 mph ABOVE season avg вҖ” sharpening, not fading. Applied as -1.5 vuln pts (suppressive) when data confirms upward trend.

column1: вҡ пёҸ Low zone% on PT
column2: Jul 1 2026 (FanGraphs type=23): Pitcher's zone% on a specific pitch type is вүҘ6pp below league avg. Losing command of that weapon means falling behind in counts on their best pitch вҖ” batters see more hittable pitches. Applies per pitch type (FF, SL, CH, etc.); largest deficit shown in notes.

Jul 1 2026 (FanGraphs type=23): Pitcher's HR/FB% on a specific pitch type is вүҘ5pp above league avg for that pitch. Identifies which exact pitch is the HR surrender weapon, beyond overall HR/FB%. E.g. slider HR/FB% 19% vs 14% league avg = slider is the threat pitch. Adds to pitcher_vuln_score per-pitch across all pitch types.

Jul 1 2026 (pitcher-first stacking): Pitcher has BOTH HR-prone L5 (recent_hr_factor вүҘ1.35) AND command issues L5 (BB/9 вүҘ4.5), OR has SEVERE VELO DECLINE (вүҘ2.5 mph drop L5). ALL batters facing this pitcher receive +3.0 score pts independently of their individual BBE history. Signal is pitcher-level вҖ” reflects that this pitcher is actively struggling RIGHT NOW and any hitter with reasonable power has elevated HR equity. Pitcher-name keyed: does NOT apply to the opposing team's batters. Backtest (66 slates): pitchers giving вүҘ2 HRs to our batters = 53.5% HR rate (3.33x baseline). Production estimate with leading-indicator precision ~35%: ~29% HR rate (1.81x baseline).

Jul 1 2026 (pitcher-first stacking): вүҘ2 batters in today's lineup each independently carry a T3+ BBE grade (вүҘ1 confirmed HR in L10 BBE on this pitcher's weak pitch). ALL batters facing this starter receive +3.0 score pts. Signal: when two or more batters have independently proven HR contact on this pitcher's specific weak pitch, the structural vulnerability is confirmed from multiple data sources. Pitcher-name keyed вҖ” no spillover to opposing team's batters. Backtest: combined +6.0 boost (cascade + multi-BBE together) improves top-5 HR getter capture rate from 11.9% вҶ’ 15.3% and top-10 from 25.1% вҶ’ 29.9% across 66 slates.

Jul 2026: Batter's barrel% on a specific pitch type sourced from BBEs against THIS pitcher specifically (вүҘ3 BBE gate), not the season-wide aggregate. More precise than season splits вҖ” if a batter has 25% barrel on Lauer's four-seam across 4 career BBEs, that's a direct matchup signal. Barrel%вүҘ20% = +6 conv (PITCHER-SPECIFIC BARREL MATCH). Barrel% 12-20% = +3 conv (PITCHER-SPECIFIC CONTACT). Below 12% = transparent note only, season aggregate used. Source is always labelled in rationale so you can see which grade is driving the barrel% shown.
Vuln44-48 PITCH DOM pick demoted from HR grade but still valid HIT signal (1.09x hit rate). Appears in hit picks list. Fade for HR.
Original sharp combo: WHRвүҘ70% + ConsвүҘ60% + Prob>10% + ParkвүҘ1.00. 17-slate validated at 67.9%.
PwrвүҘ58 + PM 1.00-1.07 + VulnвүҘ44 + Rank 5-25. 5-slate validated at 100% hit rate (14/14). Market not yet efficient in sweet PM band.
Best validated hit zone: CSV audit (57 slates): 63.3% hit (250/395, 1.09x). Consistent signal вҖ” add Sig 1-5 for 82.3% (1.41x) screamer tier.
41-slate: CSV audit (57 slates): 58.6% hit at Rank 1-3 (1.01x) вҖ” essentially baseline. Grade demoted. High scores often reflect Savant inflation. Prefer Sweetвҳ… + qualitative combos.
Average zone: hit rate near baseline (~60%). No significant edge вҖ” use other signals to confirm.
Below average. HR still possible for power bats but hit prop is weak. Avoid for hit-only plays.
Cold WHR zone (HS<20). Counterintuitively hits at CSV audit (57 slates): 64.2% hit (208/324, 1.10x). Real edge вҖ” do NOT fade for hits. Add PMвүҘ1.03 for 66.2% (1.14x).

Sweet PM zone (1.00-1.07) + ProbвүҘ14% + Vuln 44-55 + Edge<0 + Score<65. CSV audit (57 slates): 18.4% HR (1.15x, n=636). Real but modest edge вҖ” original 5-slate rate (36-39%) was too small to rely on.
Good HR pick with 2-3 supporting signals. ~18% HR rate. Worth playing at reasonable odds.

Composite signal score вүҘ12 (ELITE tier) AND raw power вүҘ78 (recalibrated Jun 14 2026; was PwrвүҘ60). 33-slate at old gate: 19.1% HR (1.22x, n=47). Moderate grade вҖ” SigвүҘ8 alone is base-rate noise; SigвүҘ14 does not beat вүҘ12. Useful when no pitch-edge grade fires.

Jun 23 2026 NEW GRADE: HS 35-39 (SWEETвҳ… zone) + Edge vs Mkt вүҘ +15% + Sig вүҘ 4. HR rate: 38% in our pkl (3/8) AND 38.5% in external 58-slate Excel backtest (10/26) вҖ” both datasets independently converge at the same rate. At 5.0Г— baseline this is one of the top-performing HR grades in the model. Mechanism: the market has triple reason to fade (form slightly off вҶ’ HS 35-39, not hot), but the model has a confirmed signal edge (SigвүҘ4) AND the market is significantly underpricing the matchup (EdgeвүҘ+15%). The bat is in a reset zone, not a cold zone вҖ” it's actually a buying opportunity the market misses. Tracks under 'sweet_star_edge_spike_hr'. Conv boost: +15. Grade fires when SWEET PM HR is not already active for the same pick.

Jun 23 2026 TRACKING GRADE: Power вүҘ87 + Vuln вүҘ52 (trap zone) + HS <20 (ice cold bat). External 58-slate backtest: 100% HR (2/2, Carroll Jun 13 + Ohtani Jun 22). Zero fires in our pkl (the two instances are both post-pkl). Extremely rare вҖ” fires ~1 per 20 slates. Logic: market fades aggressively (trap pitcher + cold bat + weak form), but extreme raw power (вүҘ87) is immune to recent form. The triple-market-fade creates mispricing. TRACKING ONLY вҖ” n=2 is too small to bet as standalone. Monitor for 5+ slates. Conv floor: 40 (ensures PLAY designation when it fires). Existing V52+ extreme power override (37.5%, 2.41x, n=8) already covers the broader archetype.
Moderate HR signal. ~15% HR rate. HR is possible but not a primary play вҖ” focus on hits.
Highest hit confidence. WHRвүҘ80% + all sharp signals aligned. Strongest hit prop play.
SigвүҘ4 + HS 35-50 + PMвүҘ1.03. 41-slate: 63.5% hit (1.01x, n=219) вҖ” ~baseline; Sig captures the market-underpriced matchup edge in a validated hit zone.
Sharp combo fires: ConsвүҘ60% + EnvвүҘ0.95 + Platoon + ScoreвүҘ38. Validated (1-slate, 4/4).
WHR-based sharp: WHRвүҘ70% + ConsвүҘ60% + Prob>10% + ParkвүҘ1.00. 17-slate: 67.9% hit rate.
Multiple hit signals confirmed. WHRвүҘ65% or Sweetвҳ… zone + clean flags. Solid prop pick.
